description: Map that syncs viewport bounds to param.

param.description: Canvas parameter for bounds [west, south, east, north]

showSearch.description: Show a geocoder search bar overlay on the map.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden")

propsSchema.description: Interactive Mapbox map that syncs viewport bounds [west, south, east, north] with a canvas parameter. Supports auto-send on pan/zoom or manual send via button.
